mnemonics.title: Markov Meal
mnemonics.content: Markov Makes Meals using Mean (only needs average)

mnemonics.title: Chebyshev's Check
mnemonics.content: Chebyshev Checks both Center (mean) and Spread (variance)

acronyms.usage: Used when discussing sample means distribution

visualTips.visualization: Imagine histograms morphing into bell curve as n increases

analogies.analogy: Like mixing paint colors - many combinations lead to similar neutral gray
